name: Pecan Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease three 9-inch layer cake pans. In a large bowl, cream the butter, gradually add sugar and beat until fluffy. Add the beaten eggs and melted chocolate. Stir in the dry ingredients and blend with the milk alternately. Add the nuts and vanilla. Pour into prepared pans. Bake for 35 minutes, or until the center of the cake feels solid. Cool and remove the layers from the pan.
FROSTING: Melt the butter and chocolate together. Blend in the rest of the ingredients except the nuts. Beat well to spreading consistency. Add the pecans. Spread this frosting between the layers and cover the top and sides of the cake. To serve, slice the cake with a sharp knife which you clean after each cut.
